text:
Created attachment 164829
[patch] update port to 1.0.0

Summary says it all.

Changes:

https://github.com/SpamExperts/pyzor/blob/4838af158cd02b80be78cc9972d87bf00e953da4/docs/changelog.rst

Some of the changes since 0.7.0:

 - unicode fixes
 - added pyzor-migrate
 - pyzor server digest forwarding
 - html normalization updates
 - performance improvements
